home.featuresTitle: Everything You Need to Run Events
home.featuresSubtitle: Powerful features for organizers and attendees alike
home.easyCreationDescription: Create beautiful event pages with all the details your attendees need. Add agendas, speakers, and media.
home.flexibleTicketingDescription: Multiple ticket types, discount codes, and capacity management. Accept payments or offer free tickets.
home.powerfulAnalyticsDescription: Track ticket sales, revenue, and attendee information. Make data-driven decisions for your events.

eventsPage.title: Discover Events
eventsPage.subtitle: Find events by category, date, and location.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Enter your email and password to sign in
login.verifiedSuccess: Email verified successfully! You can now log in.
login.alreadyVerified: Your email is already verified. Please log in.
login.tokenExpired: Verification link has expired. Please request a new one.
login.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

register.title: Create your account
register.organizerDescription: Set up your organizer account to publish events.
register.attendeeDescription: Create an attendee account to discover and join events.
register.passwordHint: Must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and numbers
register.acceptTermsError: Please accept the terms and conditions
register.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
register.checkEmailSubtitle: We've sent you a verification link
register.verificationInstructions: Please check your email inbox and click on the verification link to activate your account.
register.linkExpiry: The link will expire in 24 hours.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
forgotPassword.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
forgotPassword.successSubtitle: We've sent you a password reset link
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists with the email you provided, we've sent a password reset link.
forgotPassword.linkExpiry: The link will expire in 1 hour.

resetPassword.invalidDescription: This password reset link is invalid or has expired
resetPassword.invalidMessage: The password reset link you clicked is no longer valid. This can happen if:
resetPassword.reasonExpired: The link has expired (valid for 1 hour)
resetPassword.reasonUsed: The link has already been used
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been changed successfully
resetPassword.successMessage: You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.passwordHint: Must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and numbers
resetPassword.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

verifyEmail.verifiedDescription: Your email has been verified successfully
verifyEmail.emailSentDescription: Check your inbox for the verification link
verifyEmail.emailSentMessage: If an account exists with the email you provided, we've sent a verification link.
verifyEmail.linkExpiry: The link will expire in 24 hours.
verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.description: Enter your email to receive a new verification link
verifyEmail.instructions: Didn't receive the verification email? Enter your email address below and we'll send you a new one.
verifyEmail.tokenExpired: This verification link has expired. Please request a new one.
verifyEmail.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

checkoutError.contactSupport: If this problem persists, please contact support.

errors.order_not_found: The order could not be found.
errors.invalid_token: The payment token is invalid or has expired.
errors.invalid_status: The order is in an invalid state for payment.
errors.capture_failed: Failed to capture the payment. Please try again.
errors.capture_exception: An error occurred while processing your payment.
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred during checkout.

createEvent.accessDescription: Your account needs organizer permissions to create and publish events.

myEvents.subtitle: View and manage events you created.

layout.roleRequired: Organizer role is required to access the dashboard.

home.subtitle: Overview of your events, orders, and revenue.

account.title: Account Settings
account.deleteAccountDescription: Request account deletion by email confirmation. After confirmation, your account enters a grace period before final anonymization.
account.deleteAccountPendingConfirmation: Check your inbox to confirm deletion. You can request another confirmation email if the previous link expired.
account.deleteAccountScheduledDescription: Your account deletion is scheduled for {date}. You can cancel this during the grace period.
account.deleteAccountRequestedNotice: Deletion confirmation email sent. Please check your inbox.
account.deleteAccountExpiredNotice: Deletion confirmation link expired. Request a new one.
account.deleteAccountInvalidNotice: Invalid or expired account deletion link.

eventForm.noTicketTypes: No ticket types yet. Add at least one before publishing.
eventForm.selectSupportedCurrency: Select a supported currency before publishing.
eventForm.cropDescription: Adjust zoom and position, then apply crop.
eventForm.programManage: Manage people and schedule in one place so agenda items can be linked to speakers.
eventForm.programAddNow: Add program people now. After your first save, you can manage detailed speakers and agenda here.

validation.startInvalid: Use a valid start date and time.
validation.endInvalid: Use a valid end date and time.
validation.endAfterStart: End time must be after start time.
validation.ticketPriceInvalid: Enter a valid price (0 or greater).
validation.ticketCapacityInvalid: Enter a whole number greater than 0 or leave empty.
validation.addTicketBeforePublish: Add at least one ticket type before publishing.
validation.fixTicketDetails: Fix ticket type details before publishing.
validation.fixHighlightedPublish: Cannot publish yet. Fix the highlighted fields.
validation.fixHighlightedSave: Please fix the highlighted fields before saving.
validation.fixTicketFieldsPublish: Cannot publish yet. Fix ticket type fields.

eventDetails.onlineMapNotRequired: Online event map preview not required.

eventDetails.checkoutUnavailableStarted: Checkout is unavailable because this event has already started.
eventDetails.checkoutUnavailableNoTickets: Checkout is unavailable because there are no tickets currently on sale.
